content.en:
After the Lord of the Cave Void said this, the faces of the bone transformation realms present changed drastically one by one.

If this kind of thing really happens, and the Hunhe River Boundary Rift merges into the territorial sea Boundary Sea, then the strong people of the Hunhe River Boundary Rift will not be suppressed by the territorial sea Boundary Sea.

When the time comes, they can exert their full strength, how can they resist?

At this time, the Lord of the Cave Void said again: "The Hunhe Boundary Rift is really going to merge in, there will be a time, and we are not without hope to stop it." If you really can't stop it, then there is no way, just run away when the time comes!"

The Lord of the Void didn't worry too much, anyway, he was alone, and it was a big deal to run alone, who would chase him?

Even if it's a ruin cave, you don't dare to chase him!

For this kind of lonely person, if you can't kill it, just wait for revenge!

Therefore, it was impossible for the Chaos Cave to attack the Lord of the Void with such terrifying strength.

"Hey, that's all there is to it!"

The Lord of Darkness also said helplessly.

The other bone transformation realms didn't speak, they didn't want this kind of thing to happen, but if it really happened, they could only try to stop it.

Otherwise, if the Hunhe River boundary crack is really integrated into the territorial sea boundary seam, war will definitely break out, which is inevitable!

When the time comes, those forces in the Hunhe Boundary will definitely purge them in order to grab more territory.

Who made them weak!

"Let's go, don't worry so much, maybe nothing will happen!"

After the Lord of the Cave Void finished speaking, he disappeared directly.

......

Hunhe River boundary crack, mixed ruin hole.

At this time, the Lord of the Mixed Ruins also summoned the Eight Bone Transformation Realm of the Mixed Ruins Cave.

If the Ancient Mountain Lord knew that the Chaos Cave had now given birth to the Nine Bone Transformation Realms, they would definitely be shocked, because at the time of the Ancient War, the Chaos Cave did not have so many Bone Transformation Realms.

After summoning these Bone Transformation Realms, the Lord of the Ruins spoke, "I just held a meeting with the heads of other top overlord forces to discuss a plan. "

"Lord of the Ruins, what's the plan?"

The deputy cave master of the Chaos Cave, the Lord of the White Dragon, asked.

The Lord of the Ruins said: "It is a plan to integrate the Hunhe River Boundary Rift into the territorial sea boundary Rift." "

"Integrate into the boundary gap of territorial waters, why is this? The resources there are not rich, and we sacrificed a lot in the original primeval war, but we only snatched a small amount of resources and some primeval gold leaves, which is of little significance!"

Other bone deformations are not understood.

"What do you know?" said in a deep voice from the Lord of the Ruins, "Something is wrong on the banks of the Hunhe River, according to our calculations, the banks of the Hunhe River may overturn the entire Hunhe River Boundary Rift. Therefore, the best way to do this is to blend into the territorial waters. Although the territorial sea boundary seam is not enough, we must also rely on the territorial sea boundary seam. Moreover, the boundary seam itself needs to be fused with one boundary crack after another in order to improve the personality. The initial territorial sea boundary gap may really be just a small gap area, so don't worry about that. We need to keep the Hunhe River Boundary Rift before we can exist forever. "

"Yes!"

Several bone transformations responded.

At this time, the Lord of the White Dragon asked, "Lord of the Ruins, when will we carry out this plan?"

The Lord of the Ruins said: "Wait until our Hunhe Boundary Rift opens the entrance to the rift leading to the territorial sea boundary rift. When the time comes, we will join forces to force the Hunhe River Boundary Rift into the territorial sea boundary rift through the entrance of this rift. As for now, you need to arrange a part of the magic circle first, and when the time comes, you can open the magic circle, and you can move the entire Hunhe Boundary Seam. "

Next, the Lord of the Mixed Ruins ordered the Eight Bone Transformation Realms of the Mixed Ruins Cave to arrange the formation one after another.

......

Ye Tian didn't know these things in the Bone Transformation Realm, he still practiced silently, creating one top primeval bone technique after another, so that his immeasurable bones and bones were transformed, and his strength was also steadily improving.

"One hundred and fifty-five immeasurable bones have completed bone transformation, it's really difficult!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

It is too difficult for an ancient-level genius to become a bone transformation realm, but once he breaks through, his strength will definitely be extremely terrifying.

Therefore, it is difficult to say the gains and losses.

Then, he paid attention to the recent situation of the Terrans.

"The human race has now given birth to hundreds of thousands of blood transformation realms, it's not bad!"

Ye Tian was pleased.

Even if there are many Blood Transformation Realm races, there are only so many Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses!

And the human race still has a lot of powerful blood transformation realms, there are also some four blood transformation realms, five blood transformation realms, and even six blood transformation realms and seven blood transformation realms.

For example, his son Ye Xingchen has now increased his strength to the primeval level genius of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm, and his combat power is no less than that of the top Nine Blood Transformation Realm.

The Terran grew so fast, naturally thanks to the sunfish tears he obtained from the Hunhe River Rift.

"It's a pity that I don't have a chance to enter the Hunhe River Boundary Crack again!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

In the blink of an eye, another period of time has passed.

The boundary between the territorial waters was very calm, and nothing major happened.

Hunhe River Boundary Seam.

Click!!

A huge crack appeared above the sea of ruins.

Whew!!!

A bone transformation of the Chaos Cave appeared here, and the Lord of the Chaos also came.

"It's finally there!"

The Lord of the Ruins looked at the entrance of the rift with a satisfied expression.

This is the second time it has been connected to the boundary gap in territorial waters, and the first time they don't know much about it, otherwise they would have done it a long time ago.

Whoa!!!

A venerable bone transformation realm has come here from all over the world.

Rumble!!!!!

The Ancient Chaos Dragon also came, making a bone transformation realm show a look of fear.

"Ancient Chaos Dragon, you've woken up!"

The Lord of the Ruins said lightly.

"Hehe, you're all about to turn the Hunhe River Realm upside down during this time, and even my sea of chaos has been affected, can I still not wake up?"

The Ancient Chaos Dragon said coldly.

"Ancient Chaos Dragon, since you have also woken up, then get involved and help, anyway, this matter is beneficial to our Hunhe Realm Seam, and it is also good for you! You don't want to wake up, and the Hunhe River Boundary Rift will be gone!"

"Okay, I'll help too!"

The Ancient Chaos Dragon agreed.

"Then go back to the places and let's get started!"

The Lord of the Ruins suggests.

Next, these Bone Transformation Realm Beings returned to a specific location one by one, manipulating the magic circle to move the entire Hunhe Boundary Rift.

"Great array, up!"

The Lord of the Ruins and many other bone transformation realms stimulated the Great Array, and began to move the Hunhe River Boundary Rift, and then merged into the territorial sea boundary Rift.

Click!!!

The entrance to the crack grew bigger and bigger, and it spread.

As a result, a large crack was also revealed on the side of the boundary rift in the territorial waters, which was discovered.

Dark Sea.

When the Lord of Darkness received the news, his face immediately changed.

"The worst feared situation has happened!"

The Lord of Darkness.
